title: Attenuation of Immune Senescence Markers After Intensive Cancer Therapy Through Resistance Training: A Pilot Study.
snippet: Chemotherapy and radiation accelerate aging of multiple systems, including the immune and musculoskeletal systems. Resistance training may mitigate some of the late physiologic effects of cancer therapy.We developed a community-based pilot study of resistance training for long-term cancer survivors meeting criteria for pre-frailty or frailty (= 8; 6 allogen...
